sKW9kWAIdI0.13: I can take the afternoon, the nighttime comes around you too.
sKW9kWAIdI0.14: You can know what you mean to me.

sLyFeo48iqw.0: Every step I took, the end seen near.
sLyFeo48iqw.1: Silent voices tried to break my will.
sLyFeo48iqw.2: But something inside said I could stand still.
sLyFeo48iqw.3: No shortcuts taken, no easy road.
sLyFeo48iqw.4: Every scar I earned, a story told.
sLyFeo48iqw.5: The weight of past mistakes in my chest.
sLyFeo48iqw.6: But fearless hearts can face the test.
sLyFeo48iqw.7: The darkness calls, but I won't fall.
sLyFeo48iqw.8: I hear the echo, I heed the call.
sLyFeo48iqw.10: I see the truth, I am fearless here.
sLyFeo48iqw.11: Fearless, the lies all fade to dust.
sLyFeo48iqw.12: Fearless, I rise because I must.
sLyFeo48iqw.13: In the mirror, I see it clear.
sLyFeo48iqw.14: The stronger self is standing near.
sLyFeo48iqw.15: Fearless, no chains can hold me down.
sLyFeo48iqw.16: Fearless, I take back all my ground.
sLyFeo48iqw.17: Through the night, through every fear,
sLyFeo48iqw.18: I stand alive, I am fearless.

SN_6XVYOtOI.1: Yo-ho, the sails are high, the cannons roar.
SN_6XVYOtOI.2: We've crossed the seven seas, we're back for more.
SN_6XVYOtOI.3: Golden rum, the tales we'll spin.
SN_6XVYOtOI.4: The night is ours, let the plunder begin.
SN_6XVYOtOI.5: Raise the Jolly Roger, wave it in the sky.
SN_6XVYOtOI.6: Feel the wind, hear the seagulls cry.
SN_6XVYOtOI.7: The Buccaneers are back, yeah they're back again.
SN_6XVYOtOI.8: From the harbor to the waves, let the story begin.
SN_6XVYOtOI.11: Through storms and tides, we've sailed so far.
SN_6XVYOtOI.12: With a compass of courage and a guiding star.
SN_6XVYOtOI.13: The treasure we seek is the life we take.
